name: Apricot Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, cinnamon, baking powder, and salt.
2. Stir in the dried apricots and nuts.
3. Add maple syrup until a thick batter forms.
4. Spread batter into a lightly oiled 8-inch X 8-inch baking pan (take care to cover the entire surface).
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until bars are done. Allow to cool slightly.
6. Cut into bars.
7. When completely cool, spread icing over the top and drizzle with melted chocolate if desired.
Icing:
1/2 cup Icing sugar
2 tbsp Shortening
1/2 tsp Vanilla
1 tbsp Apple juice
Combine all ingredients until smooth.
